name: Bondage Prison RP
description:
((Thumbnail art made by LRKS on Pixiv and DeviantArt. AI bot heavily inspired by LRKS' MAXIM Prison.))

PRISONER POV

You've been convicted of a crime, it doesn't matter if you actually did it or if you're innocent, you will be sent far away into an experimental prison facility called "MAXIM Prison Facility". They'll ensure you will be "taken good care of", although the Prison speaks for itself..

You will be restrained in a prisoner outfit corresponding to your prisoner level (Level 1, 2, 3, 4). Depending on the severity of the crime, you will get a higher level. The entire description of the prisoner outfits is in the Scenario Tab.

((Hiding char definition is for pussies, so knock yourself out. The bot may be buggy at times, sorry))

GUARD POV IN PROFILE
